description: Curated restaurant packs built from named food writers, 2025-2026 sources only

cities.description: 36 restaurants from 5 independent sources — Strategy C methodology
cities.notes: Strategy C pack — all independent sources, no commercial conflicts. Both-pool zero is structural: independent EN and PT critics cover different restaurant segments. Geocoding pending.

cities.description: 10 restaurants from 3 named sources across English and French
cities.notes: Zero both-pool entries. Thin source pool — single blogger dominated, concentration cap applied. NatGeo secondary + TelQuel primary (1 entry) + Maroclovers primary.

cities.description: 17 restaurants from 5 named sources, all English tourist-facing
cities.notes: All sources tourist-facing — no local food critics in Chefchaouen. Bab Ssour confirmed by 5 sources including FR+EN both-pool. Nominatim v3 achieved 65% geocoding hit rate with zero false positives.

cities.description: 52 restaurants from 8 named sources, all English. Supplementary pass 2026-04-02 added 7 Caribbean and Italian restaurants from NOW Toronto and Madame Marie.
